raw: make the install script also clean up old links
improved: In scripts/link-skills.sh, after creating per-skill symlinks in ~/.claude/skills, remove stale symlinks that point into this repo's skills/ dir but whose source folder no longer exists. Only prune links resolving into $REPO/skills; never touch unrelated symlinks or real dirs. Print pruned <name> for each. Done when running after deleting a skill folder removes its dangling link.
note: "old links" was undefined; pinned to dangling symlinks from removed/renamed skills, scoped prune to repo links, gave a done-check.
